🔧 SYSTEM STATUS & NEXT STEPS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Current Mode: STANDALONE DEMO (no live YouTube API)
⚠️  To Enable Live DM Ingestion (choose one method):

1. EMAIL FORWARDING (Recommended)
   → Forward YouTube DMs to an email address
   → Script: youtube-dm-email-parser.py
   → Setup: 15 minutes
   → Best for: Steady DM flow, email-native workflows

2. WEBHOOK RECEIVER (Real-time)
   → Accept DM webhooks from external service
   → Script: youtube-dm-webhook.py
   → Setup: 20 minutes + webhook configuration
   → Best for: Instant processing, always-on monitoring

3. MANUAL QUEUE (Immediate)
   → Drop DMs into .cache/youtube-dm-inbox.jsonl manually
   → Monitor picks them up next run
   → Setup: 2 minutes
   → Best for: Testing, low-volume operations

4. YOUTUBE API OAUTH (Native)
   → Direct YouTube API integration
   → Setup: 30 minutes (Google Cloud Console + credentials)
   → Best for: Full automation, production deployment
   
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
